title: Senior Software Engineer - Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Pune operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises:
Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises!
